name: Psilocybin / Mushrooms

dosing: Most common dose is 1-1.5g dried mushrooms, which provides noticeable psychoactive effects while remaining manageable
Sub-gram doses of 0.4-0.6g dried are used for a gentler approach with minimal psychoactive effects
Higher doses of 2-3g dried are used by experienced users seeking stronger cycle-breaking effects
Fresh truffles are dosed at 5-10g, roughly equivalent to 1-1.5g dried mushrooms
preparations: Most commonly eaten as dried whole mushrooms, or brewed into tea by grinding and steeping in hot water for 10-15 minutes
Lemon tek involves soaking ground mushrooms in lemon juice for 20 minutes before drinking, which may speed onset and reduce nausea
Can also be packed into gel capsules as dried powder, or blended into a smoothie with fruit juice
schedule: Standard busting protocol is one dose every 5 days until the cycle breaks, typically requiring 2-3 doses over 2-3 weeks
Some users dose every 1-2 weeks instead, especially if slapbacks are severe
A monthly maintenance dose during remission can help prevent new cycles from starting

sideEffects: Slapback headache (temporary worsening 1-2 days after dose)
Anxiety or panic during the experience
